content: The syn justification is no longer relevant here: https://rust-for-linux.com/the-safe-pinned-initialization-problem#pin-complications

thanks for the info!

that is a historic blog post that I wrote way back in 2022/2023, maybe we should add a banner that this contains outdated information, as I want to keep it as a historical time-capsule and not an up-to-date thing, we could maybe have something new there if people want it
Yeah a banner with that information would be great. People may assume that all of that information is synced (or supposed to be synced) with the current tree
